    def test_path_around_obstacles():
        grid = [
            [1, 1, 1],
            [1, 0, 1],   # wall at (1,1)

        ]
        astar = AStarGrid(grid)
        start, end = (0, 0), (2, 2)
        path = astar.find_path(start, end)

        assert path[0] == start and path[-1] == end

        assert all(grid[r][c] != 0 for r, c in path)

    def test_weighted_grid_prefers_lower_cost():
        # high cost corridor (value 5) vs low‑cost detour (value 1)

            [1, 5, 1, 1],
            [1, 5, 1, 5],
            [1, 1, 1, 5],
            [1, 5, 5, 1],

    def test_size_with_mixed_expired_and_valid(mock_time):
        cache = TTLCache(capacity=3, default_ttl=5)
        cache.put("a", 1)   # expires at t=5
        cache.put("b", 2)   # expires at t=5
        cache.put("c", 3)   # expires at t=5
    
        # all valid
        assert cache.size() == 3
    
        # advance time so that 'a' and 'b' expire, 'c' still valid
        next(mock_time)  # t=1
        next(mock_time)  # t=2
        next(mock_time)  # t=3
        next(mock_time)  # t=4
>       assert cache.size() == 3   # lazy cleanup hasn't run yet
